sd1fc5748.setting: The stormy Atlantic Ocean at night
sd1fc5748.synopsis: The Professor falls into the churning dark water.

s5900bb93.setting: Surface of the water near a metallic hull
s5900bb93.synopsis: The hero clings to a hard, metal surface in the sea.

s8cda7722.synopsis: Conseil helps the Professor stay afloat on the metal back.

sa71727f0.setting: A dark hatch opening on the submarine
sa71727f0.synopsis: A door opens and mysterious men appear.

sbb590e30.setting: A grand salon filled with books and maps
sbb590e30.synopsis: Captain Nemo introduces himself to the guests.

s8c343acf.setting: The control room of the Nautilus
s8c343acf.synopsis: Nemo explains his mission of freedom.

sc957187e.setting: An underwater forest of red and pink coral
sc957187e.synopsis: The crew walks along the sea floor in diving suits.

s8a72c700.setting: Deep sea floor with exotic fish
s8a72c700.synopsis: The hero sees rare species never before recorded.

s3958f9b9.setting: The edge of a deep sea trench
s3958f9b9.synopsis: The group looks down into a glowing blue abyss.

sfe2f2bff.synopsis: A giant tentacle slams against the glass.

s4c403a09.setting: The deep dark ocean surrounding the sub
s4c403a09.synopsis: The Great Kraken wraps its arms around the hull.

s9f7eca46.synopsis: The ship groans under the pressure of the attack.

s1ffada75.synopsis: Nemo opens the shutters to show the bioluminescence.

scc4f97f7.synopsis: Jellyfish and glowing organisms float by.

sf366fa5c.synopsis: The hero looks through Nemo's collection of books.

s87bb6833.setting: Outside the sub, near the propeller
s87bb6833.synopsis: The crew works together to clear the debris.

s0de658b7.setting: The deck of the Nautilus at the surface
s0de658b7.synopsis: Nemo looks out at the horizon.

sf3dadc21.setting: The sunset over a calm ocean

se480895c.synopsis: The hero decides to stay and learn more.

sc165b12f.synopsis: Conseil and the hero organize their findings.

s151d9627.synopsis: The submarine disappears into the blue.

s7be788a3.synopsis: Nemo leaves the hero near a beach with a satchel.

sce3d7e05.synopsis: The hero writes his book by candlelight.

saacf67c2.setting: Children reading the book by the shore
saacf67c2.synopsis: The message of conservation spreads to others.
